items.name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
Dior D-LITE Handbag
 ✨ Black Helios lace 5-grid embroidery ✨
This Lady D-Lite handbag blends classic elegance with a fashionable look. Embroidered throughout with Pietro Ruffo's design, it highlights the classic butterfly beauty of the series, accented with the text L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles. The front features the Christian Dior Paris logo, paired with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium size, with a detachable embroidered wide shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody.
Model: D6814, Dimensions: 24 x 20 x 11cm, 📸 Exclusive real-life photos 🎞✨ with original packaging gift box 🎁]

items.name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
❤️❤️Lady Dior Three-Compartment Embroidery Full Rhinestone, meticulously crafted from satin material. The full rhinestone pattern is created with extensive beaded embroidery, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. Adorned with light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charm, accented with white faux crystals, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Mini style, with detachable chain strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody, an ideal companion for evening wear. Detachable chain strap, can be paired with other embroidered straps at will. Dimensions: 17×15×7cm

This Summer Bundle handbag is from the Dégradé collection, featuring a fresh drawstring design that adds a summer vibe. The Monogram Empreinte embossed leather body presents gradient tones, brightening any seasonal look. Dual handles and a detachable crossbody strap offer various carrying styles, making it a perfect companion for day and night.
